reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) triggered. Phase 03 claims RPC path bypasses empty kzg_commitments check at data_column_verification.rs:538-540. Verification confirms gossip path enforces this check explicitly, while RPC path uses CustodyDataColumn::from_asserted_custody (block_sidecar_coupling.rs:393) bypassing verify_data_column_sidecar. However, RPC data columns undergo KZG verification via validate_data_columns (kzg_utils.rs:49-96) which enforces equal-length invariant (cells.len == proofs.len == commitments.len). If kzg_commitments is empty, column must also be empty (per spec invariant PROP-6a4369e9-inv-010), and empty column is rejected at kzg_utils.rs:64. The two validation paths are functionally equivalent: gossip checks kzg_commitments.is_empty() directly; RPC enforces via column.is_empty() + length-equality check. No bypass exists. Spec reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json line 263-279 requires non-empty kzg_commitments, which is enforced by both paths through different mechanisms.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: kzg_commitments must not be empty in a valid data column sidecar. (forall sidecar: accepted(sidecar) => len(sidecar.kzg_commitments) > 0)
